## Brand Compliance Verification

### Color Palette Alignment

| Brand Color | Hex | Usage in Mockups | Status |
|-------------|-----|------------------|--------|
| Warm Yellow (Primary) | #FFC300 | Primary CTAs, highlights, accent buttons | ✅ Strong presence |
| Deep Blue (Secondary) | #0581A7 | Secondary actions, navigation, links | ✅ Well represented |
| Warm Green (Tertiary) | #BDBD0D | Success states, accents, variety | ✅ Present |
| Dark Gray (Text) | #142329 | Typography, dark elements | ✅ Used appropriately |
| White/Cream | #F5F5F5 | Backgrounds, cards | ✅ Clean execution |

**Assessment:** All brand colors are present and used appropriately. The warm yellow dominates CTAs as specified, deep blue provides secondary action hierarchy, and warm green adds accent variety.

### Typography Alignment

| Requirement | Observation | Status |
|-------------|-------------|--------|
| Outfit-style geometric sans-serif for headings | Bold, clean headings visible in all mockups | ✅ Present |
| Inter-style readable sans-serif for body | Clean, readable body text | ✅ Present |
| No decorative/script fonts | All typography is clean and modern | ✅ Compliant |

**Assessment:** Typography follows brand guidelines with geometric sans-serif for headings and clean sans-serif for body text.

### Visual Language Alignment

| Element | Requirement | Observation | Status |
|---------|-------------|-------------|--------|
| Droplet shapes | Present throughout UI | Visible in timeline nodes, UI elements, background patterns | ✅ Strong presence |
| Rounded corners | No sharp angles | All cards, buttons, and containers have soft rounded corners | ✅ Consistent |
| Soft shadows | 3-layer shadow system | Subtle depth visible in cards and elevated elements | ✅ Present |
| Organic curves | Suggesting water ripples | Flowing lines in timeline, curved backgrounds | ✅ Well executed |

**Assessment:** Visual language strongly aligns with brand. Droplet shapes are a signature element, rounded corners create approachable feel, and organic curves suggest connection.

### Archetype Expression

| Archetype | Weight | Expression in Mockups | Status |
|-----------|--------|----------------------|--------|
| **Caregiver** | 50% | Warm, nurturing interface; "Your Memories" personalization; soft shadows; approachable rounded corners; "Good Morning" greeting | ✅ Strong expression |
| **Creator** | 30% | Clean grid layouts; intentional spacing; crafted typography; organized information hierarchy | ✅ Well expressed |
| **Explorer** | 20% | "Your Journey" timeline; "Explore Allura" CTA; discovery-oriented navigation | ✅ Present |

**Assessment:** All three archetypes are expressed. Caregiver warmth dominates through soft UI and personal language. Creator craft shows in organized layouts. Explorer appears in journey-focused elements.

### Voice & Messaging Alignment

| Guideline | Observation | Status |
|-----------|-------------|--------|
| "Community" not "users" | "Your Memories," "Your Journey" — personal language | ✅ Compliant |
| "Members" not "customers" | User-centric terminology throughout | ✅ Compliant |
| Warm, inviting language | "Where Memories Come Alive," "Good Morning," "Capture a Memory" | ✅ Strong alignment |
| No tech jargon | Clean, accessible language | ✅ Compliant |

**Assessment:** Messaging aligns with brand voice — warm, personal, and community-focused.

## Individual Mockup Analysis

### 1. Dashboard Main (`dashboard-main.png`)
**Strengths:**
- Clean grid layout with memory cards
- "Allura" branding prominent
- Navigation sidebar with rounded icons
- Droplet shapes in memory card icons
- Warm yellow and deep blue color balance

**Opportunities:**
- Background color blocks are bolder than brand guidelines suggest
- Could use more cream/white space for breathing room

**Brand Score:** 8.5/10

---

### 2. Dashboard Timeline (`dashboard-timeline.png`)
**Strengths:**
- Beautiful flowing timeline with droplet-shaped nodes
- "Your Journey" header expresses Explorer archetype
- Connected lines suggest community and connection
- Profile avatars add human element
- Deep blue connectors with warm accents

**Opportunities:**
- Background is very bold (red, yellow, green blocks)
- Could benefit from more subtle background treatment

**Brand Score:** 9/10

---

### 3. Dashboard Search (`dashboard-search.png`)
**Strengths:**
- Large, prominent "FIND YOUR MEMORIES" headline
- Pill-shaped search bar in warm yellow
- Rounded result cards with brand colors
- Clean, organized layout

**Opportunities:**
- Color blocks in background are quite bold
- Some text appears garbled (AI generation artifact)

**Brand Score:** 8/10

---

### 4. Mobile Home (`mobile-home.png`)
**Strengths:**
- "Good Morning" greeting creates Caregiver warmth
- Bottom navigation with rounded icons
- Memory cards with rounded corners
- "Recent memories" section with horizontal scroll
- Droplet shapes in background

**Opportunities:**
- Background color blocks are very bold
- Could use more white/cream space

**Brand Score:** 8.5/10

---

### 5. Mobile Capture (`mobile-capture.png`)
**Strengths:**
- Large, inviting "Capture a memory" CTA button
- Rounded input fields
- Colorful category buttons in brand colors
- Clean iPhone frame presentation
- Tab navigation (Home, Capture, Journal, Settings)

**Opportunities:**
- Background color blocks are bold
- Could use more subtle background

**Brand Score:** 9/10

---

### 6. Mobile Settings (`mobile-settings.png`)
**Strengths:**
- "Your profile" personal language
- Circular avatar with warm yellow ring
- Rounded settings rows with toggle switches
- Clean, organized layout
- Droplet shapes in background

**Opportunities:**
- Duplicate "Privacy" row (AI generation artifact)
- Background is very bold

**Brand Score:** 8/10

---

### 7. Marketing Landing (`marketing-landing.png`)
**Strengths:**
- "WHERE MEMORIES COME ALIVE" — strong brand headline
- Beautiful droplet/connected node illustration
- Gradient background with brand colors
- Navigation bar with "Explore Allura" CTA
- EDITORIAL style gives marketing polish

**Opportunities:**
- Background texture is darker than brand guidelines
- Could use more white space

**Brand Score:** 9/10

---

### 8. Marketing Features (`marketing-features.png`)
**Strengths:**
- Three feature cards with brand colors
- "CAPTURE MOMENTS," "CONNECT STORIES," "CHERISH FOREVER" — strong messaging
- Rounded card corners
- Clean icon illustrations
- Balanced composition

**Opportunities:**
- Background has photorealistic texture (slight deviation from pure vector)
- Some text appears garbled (AI generation artifact)

**Brand Score:** 8.5/10
